name: release-notes
intent: Generate release notes from git log between two tags for the whole team.

interface.description: Generates release notes from git log between two tags when the user asks for changelog or release notes.

security.bashJustification: Read-only git log and git diff commands.

context.reason: Release note synthesis can be long and should not inflate the main session.

risks: Bash must stay limited to read-only git commands.
Tag names must be supplied by the user or discovered read-only.
